caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, grey, spiky wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. In front of him is a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments. On-screen text includes logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man remains seated and relatively still, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. The camera remains in a fixed medium shot, maintaining the same composition and focus on the man as he interacts with the microphone in the studio.
